title: Custom End Ship / Custom End Ship Loot
description: Change the item in the end ship structure, make a custom version or remove it entirely.
body:
# About
This is a basic datapack that replaces the ```ship.nbt``` part of an end city with a custom one. The structure file provided replaces the elytra item frame with a chest containing a renamed nether star, and moves the loot chests to the side to prevent them from linking up.





# Instructions


At this time, if you want to edit the loot in the chests, you need a tool like NBT Explorer or another NBT file editor. Unzip the datapack and navigate to 
```
data/minecraft/structures/end_city/ship.nbt
```
Then open the file in your NBT editor and edit the entity data for the chest with the nether star to change the item that it holds. 

If you want to make a custom end ship, you need to convert your building into a .nbt file using structure blocks.
(To remove the end ship, just save an air block as the structure)
Just replace the existing structure file with your own one and rename it to ```ship.nbt```.

In a future version I may include presets for structure like none/no elytra /default but for now you have to do it yourself.
